⚙️ ContextFlow AI Settings

Configure your AI optimization experience

🔌 API Configuration

Configure your backend API endpoint and authentication key.

The secure backend proxy URL for LLM requests.
Never shared with third parties. Stored securely in chrome.storage.local.
Select the LLM model for optimization services.

📊 Workspace Tier

Choose your feature tier to control advanced capabilities.

Free Basic features
Pro Advanced features
Ultimate All features

🔒 Privacy & Data

Control how your data is stored and processed.

Conversation history older than this will be automatically deleted.
Removes personally identifiable information from logs.
Extension will not collect data in private browsing.

⚠️ Danger Zone

Permanently removes all stored conversations and preferences from this device.

🔔 Behavior & Notifications

Configure how the extension behaves.

Automatically optimize prompts when you switch between AI platforms.
Send anonymous usage data to help us improve the product.
